text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 114 

HAC_IND 

LABEL: Health Care Acquired Condition (HAC) Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This code indicates whether the beneficiary included on the claim has a Health Care Acquired 
Condition (HAC). 

SHORT NAME: HAC_IND 

LONG NAME: HAC_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Null/missing
